config.prompt: Explain why superconductors expel magnetic fields below their critical temperature and how this differs from merely having zero resistance.

capacity_order_note: Capacities run in the supplied order. The default is descending so later smaller-cache timings receive any OS-page-cache warming; this is conservative when judging larger caches.

runs.selected_text: The phenomenon you are referring to is known as the **Meissner Effect** (or Meissner-Ochsenfeld Effect). It is the defining characteristic
